scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sol
scripts.clean: npm run clean:workspaces && npm run clean:root && echo '\nFull cleanup finished — workspaces and root junk removed'
scripts.clean:workspaces: npm run ats:clean && npm run mass-payout:clean && echo '\n All workspaces cleaned'
scripts.clean:root: rimraf dist build artifacts cache typechain-types node_modules/.cache .eslintcache coverage .nyc_output junit.xml test-results *.log *.tgz *.tar.gz .DS_Store Thumbs.db && echo '\n✅ Root junk files removed'
scripts.clean:deps: rimraf packages/*/node_modules packages/*/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules apps/*/*/node_modules node_modules && echo '\n✅ Dependency folders cleaned (package-lock.json preserved)'
scripts.clean:deps:full: npm run clean:deps && rimraf package-lock.json packages/*/dist packages/*/*/dist apps/*/dist apps/*/*/dist packages/*/build packages/*/*/build apps/*/build apps/*/*/build && echo '\n✅ All dependency files have been cleaned (including package-lock.json)'
scripts.clean:full: npm run clean:workspaces && npm run clean:deps:full && npm run clean:root && echo '\n✅ Complete cleanup finished — workspaces, dependencies, and root junk removed'
scripts.ats:setup:clean: npm run ats:clean && npm install && npm run ats:build
scripts.ats:build: npm run ats:contracts:build && npm run ats:sdk:build && npm run ats:web:build
scripts.ats:test: npm run ats:contracts:test && npm run ats:sdk:test && npm run ats:web:test
scripts.ats:test:ci: npm run ats:contracts:test:ci && npm run ats:sdk:test:ci && npm run ats:web:test:ci
scripts.ats:lint: npm run ats:lint:js && npm run ats:lint:sol
scripts.ats:start: npm ci && npm run ats:contracts:build && npm run ats:sdk:build && npm run ats:web:dev
scripts.ats:clean:
npm run ats:contracts:clean && npm run ats:sdk:clean && npm run ats:web:clean && npm run clean:deps && echo '
✅ All ATS compilation, build and similar files have been cleaned'
scripts.ats:publish: npm run ats:contracts:publish && npm run ats:sdk:publish
scripts.ats:contracts:test:ci: npm run test:ci --workspace=packages/ats/contracts --if-present || npm run test --workspace=packages/ats/contracts
